creator: conrad@th.physik.uni-bonn.de
text:
acroread4 uses '/usr/bin/lpr' as print command
If you have installed something like LPRng, printing will not work

Fix: 

It would be nice if /usr/bin/lpr could be replaced by lpr
in /usr/local/Acrobat4/Reader/intellinux/app-defaults/AcroRead
by 'make install'
How-To-Repeat: clear
